name: Hypno Visor

All new Hypnosis Visor by Eclipse Studios!!

Ever wish focus came a little easier?

Ever wanted to relax, reset, or unlock your mind’s full potential?

Step into the future with the Hypnosis VisorTM, the newest innovation from Eclipse Studios.

✨ What is it?

A sleek, lightweight visor that uses advanced visual rhythm technology and guided audio patterns to help your mind slip effortlessly into deep focus and relaxation.

🧠 Features

• Focus Mode – sharpen concentration for studying, gaming, or creative work.

• Calm Mode – reduce stress with gentle hypnotic visuals and soothing tones.

• Sleep Mode – drift into restful sleep faster than ever.

• Guided Sessions – optional voice guidance for meditation, confidence building, and habit training.

⚡ How it works

Simply place the visor over your eyes, select a mode, and watch as carefully designed spiral-light patterns synchronize with calming soundscapes. In minutes, your mind begins to unwind and focus naturally.

No complicated setup.

No wires.

Just press play and relax.

🎮 Perfect for: • Gamers needing intense focus

• Students studying late nights

• Creators battling mental blocks

• Anyone wanting a calmer mind

🌑 Eclipse Studios — Where Technology Meets the Mind

The Hypnosis VisorTM

See differently. Think differently.
creator: Kizitty
